xml.raw:
<Policy>
  <Parser parser_key="{@parser_key}" type="1" separator="1,20" arr_length="8">
    <Field position="0"  name="original_ip"     convert_tag="[[@regexGet('.*')]]" />
    <Field position="1"  name="eqp_dt"           convert_tag="[[@date('yyyy-MM-dd_HHmmss','yyyyMMddHHmmss')]]" />
    <Field position="2"  name="action" />
    <Field position="3"  name="src_ip"            org_name="src" />
    <Field position="4"  name="dstn_ip"           org_name="dst" />
    <Field position="5"  name="prtc"              org_name="proto" />
    <Field position="6"  name="location"          org_name="loc" />
    <Field position="7"  name="sensor_ip"         org_name="sensorip" />
    <Field position="8"  name="original_log"     convert_tag="[[@originalLog()]]" />
    <Field position="9"  name="vendor"            convert_tag="[[@set('checkpoint')]]" />
    <Field position="10" name="model"             convert_tag="[[@set('quantum')]]" />
    <Field position="11" name="logtype"           convert_tag="[[@set('traffic')]]" />
    <Field position="12" name="parser_version"    convert_tag="[[@set('v7')]]" />
    <Field position="13" name="eqp_type"          convert_tag="[[@set('gw')]]" />
    <Field position="14" name="parser_info"       convert_tag="[[@set('[CheckPoint]_quantum_traffic_v7_keyvalue')]]" />
  </Parser>
</Policy>
